name: naabu
title: naabu

commands.name: naabu

arguments.description: hosts to scan ports for (comma-separated)
arguments.raw: -host string[]              hosts to scan ports for (comma-separated)

arguments.description: list of hosts to scan ports (file)
arguments.raw: -list, -l string            list of hosts to scan ports (file)

arguments.description: hosts to exclude from the scan (comma-separated)
arguments.raw: -exclude-hosts, -eh string  hosts to exclude from the scan (comma-separated)

arguments.description: list of hosts to exclude from scan (file)
arguments.raw: -exclude-file, -ef string   list of hosts to exclude from scan (file)

arguments.description: ports to scan (80,443, 100-200)
arguments.raw: -port, -p string              ports to scan (80,443, 100-200)

arguments.description: top ports to scan (default 100) [full,100,1000]
arguments.raw: -top-ports, -tp string        top ports to scan (default 100) [full,100,1000]

arguments.description: ports to exclude from scan (file or comma-separated)
arguments.raw: -exclude-ports, -ep string[]  ports to exclude from scan (file or comma-separated)

arguments.description: list of ports to scan (file or comma-separated)
arguments.raw: -ports-file, -pf string[]     list of ports to scan (file or comma-separated)

arguments.description: port threshold to skip port scan for the host
arguments.raw: -port-threshold, -pts int     port threshold to skip port scan for the host

arguments.description: skip full port scans for CDN/WAF (only scan for port 80,443)
arguments.raw: -exclude-cdn, -ec             skip full port scans for CDN/WAF (only scan for port 80,443)

arguments.description: display cdn in use
arguments.raw: -display-cdn, -cdn            display cdn in use

arguments.description: general internal worker threads (default 25)
arguments.raw: -c int     general internal worker threads (default 25)

arguments.description: packets to send per second (default 1000)
arguments.raw: -rate int  packets to send per second (default 1000)

arguments.description: update naabu to latest version
arguments.raw: -up, -update                 update naabu to latest version

arguments.description: disable automatic naabu update check
arguments.raw: -duc, -disable-update-check  disable automatic naabu update check

arguments.description: file to write output to (optional)
arguments.raw: -o, -output string                     file to write output to (optional)

arguments.description: list of fields to output (comma separated)
arguments.raw: -lof, -list-output-fields              list of fields to output (comma separated)

arguments.description: exclude output fields output based on a condition
arguments.raw: -eof, -exclude-output-fields string[]  exclude output fields output based on a condition

arguments.description: write output in JSON lines format
arguments.raw: -j, -json                              write output in JSON lines format

arguments.description: write output in csv format
arguments.raw: -csv                                   write output in csv format

arguments.description: path to the naabu configuration file (default $HOME/.config/naabu/config.yaml)
arguments.raw: -config string                   path to the naabu configuration file (default $HOME/.config/naabu/config.yaml)

arguments.description: scan all the IP's associated with DNS record
arguments.raw: -scan-all-ips, -sa               scan all the IP's associated with DNS record

arguments.description: ip version to scan of hostname (4,6) - (default 4,6) (default ["4", "6"])
arguments.raw: -ip-version, -iv string[]        ip version to scan of hostname (4,6) - (default 4,6) (default ["4", "6"])

arguments.description: type of port scan (SYN/CONNECT) (default "c")
arguments.raw: -scan-type, -s string            type of port scan (SYN/CONNECT) (default "c")

arguments.description: source ip and port (x.x.x.x:yyy - might not work on OSX)
arguments.raw: -source-ip string                source ip and port (x.x.x.x:yyy - might not work on OSX)

arguments.description: payload to send in CONNECT scans (optional)
arguments.raw: -connect-payload, -cp string     payload to send in CONNECT scans (optional)

arguments.description: list available interfaces and public ip
arguments.raw: -interface-list, -il             list available interfaces and public ip

arguments.description: network Interface to use for port scan
arguments.raw: -interface, -i string            network Interface to use for port scan

arguments.description: invoke nmap scan on targets (nmap must be installed) - Deprecated
arguments.raw: -nmap                            invoke nmap scan on targets (nmap must be installed) - Deprecated

arguments.description: nmap command to run on found results (example: -nmap-cli 'nmap -sV')
arguments.raw: -nmap-cli string                 nmap command to run on found results (example: -nmap-cli 'nmap -sV')

arguments.description: list of custom resolver dns resolution (comma separated or from file)
arguments.raw: -r string                        list of custom resolver dns resolution (comma separated or from file)

arguments.description: socks5 proxy (ip[:port] / fqdn[:port]
arguments.raw: -proxy string                    socks5 proxy (ip[:port] / fqdn[:port]

arguments.description: socks5 proxy authentication (username:password)
arguments.raw: -proxy-auth string               socks5 proxy authentication (username:password)

arguments.description: dns resolution order (p/l/lp/pl) (default "l")
arguments.raw: -dns-order string                dns resolution order (p/l/lp/pl) (default "l")

arguments.description: use system DNS as fallback resolver
arguments.raw: -sr, -system-resolver            use system DNS as fallback resolver

arguments.description: resume scan using resume.cfg
arguments.raw: -resume                          resume scan using resume.cfg

arguments.description: stream mode (disables resume, nmap, verify, retries, shuffling, etc)
arguments.raw: -stream                          stream mode (disables resume, nmap, verify, retries, shuffling, etc)

arguments.description: display passive open ports using shodan internetdb api
arguments.raw: -passive                         display passive open ports using shodan internetdb api

arguments.description: timeout on input read (default 3m0s)
arguments.raw: -irt, -input-read-timeout value  timeout on input read (default 3m0s)

arguments.description: Disable Stdin processing
arguments.raw: -no-stdin                        Disable Stdin processing

arguments.description: Perform Only Host Discovery
arguments.raw: -sn, -host-discovery           Perform Only Host Discovery

arguments.description: Skip Host discovery
arguments.raw: -Pn, -skip-host-discovery      Skip Host discovery

arguments.description: Enable Host discovery
arguments.raw: -wn, -with-host-discovery      Enable Host discovery

arguments.description: TCP SYN Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
arguments.raw: -ps, -probe-tcp-syn string[]   TCP SYN Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.description: TCP ACK Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
arguments.raw: -pa, -probe-tcp-ack string[]   TCP ACK Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.description: ICMP echo request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
arguments.raw: -pe, -probe-icmp-echo          ICMP echo request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.description: ICMP timestamp request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
arguments.raw: -pp, -probe-icmp-timestamp     ICMP timestamp request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.description: ICMP address mask request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
arguments.raw: -pm, -probe-icmp-address-mask  ICMP address mask request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.description: ARP ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
arguments.raw: -arp, -arp-ping                ARP ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.description: IPv6 Neighbor Discovery (host discovery needs to be enabled)
arguments.raw: -nd, -nd-ping                  IPv6 Neighbor Discovery (host discovery needs to be enabled)

arguments.description: Reverse PTR lookup for input ips
arguments.raw: -rev-ptr                       Reverse PTR lookup for input ips

arguments.description: Service Discovery
arguments.raw: -sD, -service-discovery  Service Discovery

arguments.description: Service Version
arguments.raw: -sV, -service-version    Service Version

arguments.description: number of retries for the port scan (default 3)
arguments.raw: -retries int                    number of retries for the port scan (default 3)

arguments.description: millisecond to wait before timing out (default 1s)
arguments.raw: -timeout value                  millisecond to wait before timing out (default 1s)

arguments.description: time in seconds between scan phases (default 2)
arguments.raw: -warm-up-time int               time in seconds between scan phases (default 2)

arguments.description: ping probes for verification of host
arguments.raw: -ping                           ping probes for verification of host

arguments.description: validate the ports again with TCP verification
arguments.raw: -verify                         validate the ports again with TCP verification

arguments.description: predictive port scanning using port correlation model
arguments.raw: -ss, -smart-scan                predictive port scanning using port correlation model

arguments.description: minimum confidence for port predictions (0-100%) (default 20)
arguments.raw: -pt, -prediction-threshold int  minimum confidence for port predictions (0-100%) (default 20)

arguments.description: run diagnostic check up
arguments.raw: -health-check, -hc        run diagnostic check up

arguments.description: display debugging information
arguments.raw: -debug                    display debugging information

arguments.description: display verbose output
arguments.raw: -verbose, -v              display verbose output

arguments.description: disable colors in CLI output
arguments.raw: -no-color, -nc            disable colors in CLI output

arguments.description: display only results in output
arguments.raw: -silent                   display only results in output

arguments.description: display version of naabu
arguments.raw: -version                  display version of naabu

arguments.description: display stats of the running scan (deprecated)
arguments.raw: -stats                    display stats of the running scan (deprecated)

arguments.description: number of seconds to wait between showing a statistics update (deprecated) (default 5)
arguments.raw: -si, -stats-interval int  number of seconds to wait between showing a statistics update (deprecated) (default 5)

arguments.description: port to expose naabu metrics on (default 63636)
arguments.raw: -mp, -metrics-port int    port to expose naabu metrics on (default 63636)

arguments.description: configure projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) api key (default true)
arguments.raw: -auth                           configure projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) api key (default true)

arguments.description: configure projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) api key credential file
arguments.raw: -ac, -auth-config string        configure projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) api key credential file

arguments.description: upload / view output in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard
arguments.raw: -pd, -dashboard                 upload / view output in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard

arguments.description: upload asset results to given team id (optional)
arguments.raw: -tid, -team-id string           upload asset results to given team id (optional)

arguments.description: upload new assets to existing asset id (optional)
arguments.raw: -aid, -asset-id string          upload new assets to existing asset id (optional)

arguments.description: assets group name to set (optional)
arguments.raw: -aname, -asset-name string      assets group name to set (optional)

arguments.description: upload naabu output file (jsonl) in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard
arguments.raw: -pdu, -dashboard-upload string  upload naabu output file (jsonl) in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# naabu -h
 Naabu is a port scanning tool written in Go that allows you to enumerate open ports for hosts in a fast and reliable manner.
 
 Usage:
 naabu [flags]
 
 Flags:
 INPUT:
  -host string[]              hosts to scan ports for (comma-separated)
  -list, -l string            list of hosts to scan ports (file)
  -exclude-hosts, -eh string  hosts to exclude from the scan (comma-separated)
  -exclude-file, -ef string   list of hosts to exclude from scan (file)
 
 PORT:
  -port, -p string              ports to scan (80,443, 100-200)
  -top-ports, -tp string        top ports to scan (default 100) [full,100,1000]
  -exclude-ports, -ep string[]  ports to exclude from scan (file or comma-separated)
  -ports-file, -pf string[]     list of ports to scan (file or comma-separated)
  -port-threshold, -pts int     port threshold to skip port scan for the host
  -exclude-cdn, -ec             skip full port scans for CDN/WAF (only scan for port 80,443)
  -display-cdn, -cdn            display cdn in use
 
 RATE-LIMIT:
  -c int     general internal worker threads (default 25)
  -rate int  packets to send per second (default 1000)
 
 UPDATE:
  -up, -update                 update naabu to latest version
  -duc, -disable-update-check  disable automatic naabu update check
 
 OUTPUT:
  -o, -output string                     file to write output to (optional)
  -lof, -list-output-fields              list of fields to output (comma separated)
  -eof, -exclude-output-fields string[]  exclude output fields output based on a condition
  -j, -json                              write output in JSON lines format
  -csv                                   write output in csv format
 
 CONFIGURATION:
  -config string                   path to the naabu configuration file (default $HOME/.config/naabu/config.yaml)
  -scan-all-ips, -sa               scan all the IP's associated with DNS record
  -ip-version, -iv string[]        ip version to scan of hostname (4,6) - (default 4,6) (default ["4", "6"])
  -scan-type, -s string            type of port scan (SYN/CONNECT) (default "c")
  -source-ip string                source ip and port (x.x.x.x:yyy - might not work on OSX) 
  -connect-payload, -cp string     payload to send in CONNECT scans (optional)
  -interface-list, -il             list available interfaces and public ip
  -interface, -i string            network Interface to use for port scan
  -nmap                            invoke nmap scan on targets (nmap must be installed) - Deprecated
  -nmap-cli string                 nmap command to run on found results (example: -nmap-cli 'nmap -sV')
  -r string                        list of custom resolver dns resolution (comma separated or from file)
  -proxy string                    socks5 proxy (ip[:port] / fqdn[:port]
  -proxy-auth string               socks5 proxy authentication (username:password)
  -dns-order string                dns resolution order (p/l/lp/pl) (default "l")
  -sr, -system-resolver            use system DNS as fallback resolver
  -resume                          resume scan using resume.cfg
  -stream                          stream mode (disables resume, nmap, verify, retries, shuffling, etc)
  -passive                         display passive open ports using shodan internetdb api
  -irt, -input-read-timeout value  timeout on input read (default 3m0s)
  -no-stdin                        Disable Stdin processing
 
 HOST-DISCOVERY:
  -sn, -host-discovery           Perform Only Host Discovery
  -Pn, -skip-host-discovery      Skip Host discovery
  -wn, -with-host-discovery      Enable Host discovery
  -ps, -probe-tcp-syn string[]   TCP SYN Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
  -pa, -probe-tcp-ack string[]   TCP ACK Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
  -pe, -probe-icmp-echo          ICMP echo request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
  -pp, -probe-icmp-timestamp     ICMP timestamp request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
  -pm, -probe-icmp-address-mask  ICMP address mask request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
  -arp, -arp-ping                ARP ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
  -nd, -nd-ping                  IPv6 Neighbor Discovery (host discovery needs to be enabled)
  -rev-ptr                       Reverse PTR lookup for input ips
 
 SERVICES-DISCOVERY:
  -sD, -service-discovery  Service Discovery
  -sV, -service-version    Service Version
 
 OPTIMIZATION:
  -retries int                    number of retries for the port scan (default 3)
  -timeout value                  millisecond to wait before timing out (default 1s)
  -warm-up-time int               time in seconds between scan phases (default 2)
  -ping                           ping probes for verification of host
  -verify                         validate the ports again with TCP verification
  -ss, -smart-scan                predictive port scanning using port correlation model
  -pt, -prediction-threshold int  minimum confidence for port predictions (0-100%) (default 20)
 
 DEBUG:
  -health-check, -hc        run diagnostic check up
  -debug                    display debugging information
  -verbose, -v              display verbose output
  -no-color, -nc            disable colors in CLI output
  -silent                   display only results in output
  -version                  display version of naabu
  -stats                    display stats of the running scan (deprecated)
  -si, -stats-interval int  number of seconds to wait between showing a statistics update (deprecated) (default 5)
  -mp, -metrics-port int    port to expose naabu metrics on (default 63636)
 
 CLOUD:
  -auth                           configure projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) api key (default true)
  -ac, -auth-config string        configure projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) api key credential file
  -pd, -dashboard                 upload / view output in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard
  -tid, -team-id string           upload asset results to given team id (optional)
  -aid, -asset-id string          upload new assets to existing asset id (optional)
  -aname, -asset-name string      assets group name to set (optional)
  -pdu, -dashboard-upload string  upload naabu output file (jsonl) in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard

local_help.--help:
Naabu is a port scanning tool written in Go that allows you to enumerate open ports for hosts in a fast and reliable manner.

Usage:
  naabu [flags]

Flags:
INPUT:
   -host string[]              hosts to scan ports for (comma-separated)
   -list, -l string            list of hosts to scan ports (file)
   -exclude-hosts, -eh string  hosts to exclude from the scan (comma-separated)
   -exclude-file, -ef string   list of hosts to exclude from scan (file)

PORT:
   -port, -p string              ports to scan (80,443, 100-200)
   -top-ports, -tp string        top ports to scan (default 100) [full,100,1000]
   -exclude-ports, -ep string[]  ports to exclude from scan (file or comma-separated)
   -ports-file, -pf string[]     list of ports to scan (file or comma-separated)
   -port-threshold, -pts int     port threshold to skip port scan for the host
   -exclude-cdn, -ec             skip full port scans for CDN/WAF (only scan for port 80,443)
   -display-cdn, -cdn            display cdn in use

RATE-LIMIT:
   -c int     general internal worker threads (default 25)
   -rate int  packets to send per second (default 1000)

UPDATE:
   -up, -update                 update naabu to latest version
   -duc, -disable-update-check  disable automatic naabu update check

OUTPUT:
   -o, -output string                     file to write output to (optional)
   -lof, -list-output-fields              list of fields to output (comma separated)
   -eof, -exclude-output-fields string[]  exclude output fields output based on a condition
   -j, -json                              write output in JSON lines format
   -csv                                   write output in csv format

CONFIGURATION:
   -config string                   path to the naabu configuration file (default $HOME/.config/naabu/config.yaml)
   -scan-all-ips, -sa               scan all the IP's associated with DNS record
   -ip-version, -iv string[]        ip version to scan of hostname (4,6) - (default 4,6) (default ["4", "6"])
   -scan-type, -s string            type of port scan (SYN/CONNECT) (default "c")
   -source-ip string                source ip and port (x.x.x.x:yyy - might not work on OSX) 
   -connect-payload, -cp string     payload to send in CONNECT scans (optional)
   -interface-list, -il             list available interfaces and public ip
   -interface, -i string            network Interface to use for port scan
   -nmap                            invoke nmap scan on targets (nmap must be installed) - Deprecated
   -nmap-cli string                 nmap command to run on found results (example: -nmap-cli 'nmap -sV')
   -r string                        list of custom resolver dns resolution (comma separated or from file)
   -proxy string                    socks5 proxy (ip[:port] / fqdn[:port]
   -proxy-auth string               socks5 proxy authentication (username:password)
   -dns-order string                dns resolution order (p/l/lp/pl) (default "l")
   -sr, -system-resolver            use system DNS as fallback resolver
   -resume                          resume scan using resume.cfg
   -stream                          stream mode (disables resume, nmap, verify, retries, shuffling, etc)
   -passive                         display passive open ports using shodan internetdb api
   -irt, -input-read-timeout value  timeout on input read (default 3m0s)
   -no-stdin                        Disable Stdin processing

HOST-DISCOVERY:
   -sn, -host-discovery           Perform Only Host Discovery
   -Pn, -skip-host-discovery      Skip Host discovery
   -wn, -with-host-discovery      Enable Host discovery
   -ps, -probe-tcp-syn string[]   TCP SYN Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
   -pa, -probe-tcp-ack string[]   TCP ACK Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
   -pe, -probe-icmp-echo          ICMP echo request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
   -pp, -probe-icmp-timestamp     ICMP timestamp request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
   -pm, -probe-icmp-address-mask  ICMP address mask request Ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
   -arp, -arp-ping                ARP ping (host discovery needs to be enabled)
   -nd, -nd-ping                  IPv6 Neighbor Discovery (host discovery needs to be enabled)
   -rev-ptr                       Reverse PTR lookup for input ips

SERVICES-DISCOVERY:
   -sD, -service-discovery  Service Discovery
   -sV, -service-version    Service Version

OPTIMIZATION:
   -retries int                    number of retries for the port scan (default 3)
   -timeout value                  millisecond to wait before timing out (default 1s)
   -warm-up-time int               time in seconds between scan phases (default 2)
   -ping                           ping probes for verification of host
   -verify                         validate the ports again with TCP verification
   -ss, -smart-scan                predictive port scanning using port correlation model
   -pt, -prediction-threshold int  minimum confidence for port predictions (0-100%) (default 20)

DEBUG:
   -health-check, -hc        run diagnostic check up
   -debug                    display debugging information
   -verbose, -v              display verbose output
   -no-color, -nc            disable colors in CLI output
   -silent                   display only results in output
   -version                  display version of naabu
   -stats                    display stats of the running scan (deprecated)
   -si, -stats-interval int  number of seconds to wait between showing a statistics update (deprecated) (default 5)
   -mp, -metrics-port int    port to expose naabu metrics on (default 63636)

CLOUD:
   -auth                           configure projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) api key (default true)
   -ac, -auth-config string        configure projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) api key credential file
   -pd, -dashboard                 upload / view output in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard
   -tid, -team-id string           upload asset results to given team id (optional)
   -aid, -asset-id string          upload new assets to existing asset id (optional)
   -aname, -asset-name string      assets group name to set (optional)
   -pdu, -dashboard-upload string  upload naabu output file (jsonl) in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard

   -si, -stats-interval int  number of seconds to wait between showing a statistics update (deprecated) (default 5)
   -mp, -metrics-port int    port to expose naabu metrics on (default 63636)

CLOUD:
   -auth                           configure projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) api key (default true)
   -ac, -auth-config string        configure projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) api key credential file
   -pd, -dashboard                 upload / view output in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard
   -tid, -team-id string           upload asset results to given team id (optional)
   -aid, -asset-id string          upload new assets to existing asset id (optional)
   -aname, -asset-name string      assets group name to set (optional)
   -pdu, -dashboard-upload string  upload naabu output file (jsonl) in projectdiscovery cloud (pdcp) UI dashboard

apt_metadata.description:
fast port scanner with a focus on reliability and simplicity
This package contains a port scanning tool written in Go that allows you to
enumerate valid ports for hosts in a fast and reliable manner. It is a really
simple tool that does fast SYN/CONNECT scans on the host/list of hosts and
lists all ports that return a reply.
Main features are:
* Fast And Simple SYN/CONNECT probe based scanning.
* Optimized for ease of use and lightweight on resources
* Automatic handling of duplicate hosts between multiple subdomains
* NMAP Integration for service discovery
* Piped input / output support for integrating in workflows
* Multiple Output formats supported (JSON, File, Stdout)
* Multiple input support including HOST/IP/CIDR notation
